persona.philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King. Zoom In. Negative Space. Contrast.

headings.usage: Screen Titles, Modal Headers, Important Stats

buttons.primary: bg-[#F5A623] text-white rounded-full shadow-gold_glow font-bold active:scale-95 transition-transform
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-gray-200 text-gray-900 rounded-full font-medium active:bg-gray-50

inputs.default: bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-gray-900 placeholder:text-gray-400 focus:border-[#F5A623] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#F5A623]
inputs.chat: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-full px-5 py-3 shadow-sm focus:border-[#F5A623]

chat_bubbles.user: bg-[#F5A623] text-white rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm self-end max-w-[80%]
chat_bubbles.bot: bg-gray-100 text-gray-900 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm self-start max-w-[80%] border border-gray-200
chat_bubbles.system: bg-blue-50 text-blue-800 text-xs px-3 py-1 rounded-full self-center my-2

cards.default: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm p-5
cards.interactive: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm p-5 active:scale-[0.98] transition-transform

transitions.modal_up: Slide up from bottom with spring

accessibility_rules.contrast: Text on Gold background must be White (if #F5A623) or Dark Grey. If White text on Gold fails contrast (it does, 1.6:1), use Dark Grey text on Gold buttons or darken the Gold to #D97706 for white text.
accessibility_rules.labels: All inputs must have aria-label or accessibilityLabel

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Install 'nativewind' and 'tailwindcss' immediately. The project is raw React Native.
Use 'clsx' and 'tailwind-merge' for class conditional logic.
For Chat UI: Do not use standard list view. Use 'FlashList' or optimized 'FlatList' with inverted prop for chat history.
For Dropdowns: Create a custom bottom sheet or modal for better mobile UX. Do not use native HTML select.
Admin Dashboard: Use a 'Masonry' or 'Bento' grid layout for stats cards on mobile.
Payment Integration: Use WebViews if native SDKs are too heavy, but style the loading state perfectly.
Do NOT use 'View' for everything. Use 'SafeAreaView' where appropriate.
Always handle 'KeyboardAvoidingView' behavior on iOS/Android for chat inputs.

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1_setup: Run: yarn add nativewind tailwindcss clsx tailwind-merge lucide-react-native expo-linear-gradient @shopify/flash-list react-native-svg
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2_config: Run: npx tailwindcss init. Update babel.config.js to include 'nativewind/babel'.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4_navigation: Use expo-router Stack for screens. Use Tabs for Admin Dashboard.
